title: I Claim My Money and My Desire
subtitle: An energy statement for releasing the rule that financial power and personal desire must be split, not held together
excerpt: A short energy statement for the cultural conditioning that tells women to choose between financial authority and other parts of themselves. The release names the splitting; the allow names the wholeness.
sourceNotes: Original energy statement written for homemade.education. The release-and-allow framework is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

practice.whenToUse: Use when claiming money or authority triggers guilt, or when desire and financial ambition feel like they belong to different versions of you.

content.text: A short energy statement for the rule that says financially powerful women must trade something softer away. The release names the split; the allow names the woman who holds both.

I am ready to release every rule that says I must split my money self from my desire self, my authority from my warmth, my financial ambition from any other part of who I am. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.

I am ready to align with and allow the wholeness of a woman who claims her money, her desire, and her authority at the same time — without apology and without a split. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Written for homemade.education. The release-and-allow structure is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
